title: U.S. Obesity Tracker
disclaimer: Obesity figures reflect the latest available reporting year from public health surveillance, not real-time data. State and national rates are self-reported survey estimates (CDC BRFSS); county and city rates are model-based small-area estimates (CDC PLACES) and reflect an earlier source year, so the two are labeled separately and should not be read as identical vintages.

state.sourceLong: CDC Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System - Nutrition, Physical Activity, and Obesity

national.summary: U.S. adult obesity has risen from 27.4% in 2011 to 33.1% in 2024 (+5.7 points over 13 years).
